texts.buy_admin_custom_hint: 🧪 Test connections are available for administrators without payment.

texts.buy_unavailable: 💳 Buy VPN subscription Fixed tariffs are temporarily unavailable.
texts.buy_user_payment_hint: ℹ️ After selecting a tariff, you will see the offer agreement and payment step.
texts.catalog_payment_details: 💳 Buy VPN tariff You selected tariff {plan_name} for {price_line}. {locations_line}{total_line}To pay, transfer {amount} ₽ to card number: {payment_card}. After payment, click the button below to confirm.
texts.client_setup_guide: 📌 Recommendations for using our VPN! Best client: INCY ⚙️ Settings: Open 📥 Download client: Open 💡 Note: for INCY we recommend using JSON subscription
texts.compensate_positive_days: ❌ The number of days must be greater than zero.
texts.custom_plan_limits_out_of_range: ❌ Custom tariff parameters out of allowed range
texts.custom_payment_request_received: ✅ Payment confirmation request for custom tariff received. After payment verification, you will receive a notification about your subscription status.
texts.custom_tariff_admin_test_hint: 🧪 For administrators, custom tariff is created in test mode without payment confirmation.
texts.custom_tariff_build_failed: ❌ Failed to build custom tariff. Start over.
texts.custom_tariff_info_formula: Formula: total = {base} + GB × {gb_coef} + IP × D × {ip_day_coef} + ΣLOC × D
texts.custom_tariff_invalid_duration: ❌ Enter an integer for subscription duration.
texts.custom_tariff_invalid_duration_range: ❌ Subscription duration must be in range {min_days}-{max_days} days.
texts.custom_tariff_invalid_gb: ❌ Enter an integer for traffic volume in GB.
texts.custom_tariff_invalid_gb_range: ❌ Traffic volume must be in range {min_gb}-{max_gb} GB.
texts.custom_tariff_invalid_ip: ❌ Enter an integer for IP address limit.
texts.custom_tariff_invalid_ip_range: ❌ IP limit must be in range {min_ip}-{max_ip}.
texts.custom_tariff_invalid_limits: ❌ Custom tariff parameters out of allowed range. Start over.
texts.custom_tariff_locations_text: ⚙️ Custom tariff Step 4/4: select one or more locations. Selected: {selected_text}
texts.custom_tariff_payment_details: 💳 Custom tariff payment Tariff: {plan_name} Locations: {servers} Amount to pay: {amount} ₽ Transfer {amount} ₽ to card number: {payment_card}. After transfer, click the confirmation button.
texts.custom_tariff_payment_prepare_failed: ❌ Failed to prepare payment. Create custom tariff again.
texts.custom_tariff_select_locations: 🌍 Select locations using the buttons below or cancel.
texts.custom_tariff_step_days: ⚙️ Custom tariff Step 3/4: enter subscription duration in days. Range: {min_days}-{max_days} days.
texts.custom_tariff_step_gb: ⚙️ Custom tariff Step 1/4: enter traffic volume in GB. Range: {min_gb}-{max_gb} GB.
texts.custom_tariff_step_ip: ⚙️ Custom tariff Step 2/4: enter IP address limit. Range: {min_ip}-{max_ip}.
texts.custom_tariff_summary: ⚙️ Custom tariff Parameters: • Traffic: {traffic_gb} GB • Devices: {ip_limit} • Duration: {duration} • Locations: {servers} (+{location_daily_total} ₽/day) Formula: {formula} Price without discount: {base_total} ₽ {price_line}{next_step_text}
texts.custom_tariff_unavailable_locations: ⛔ Custom tariff temporarily unavailable: locations not configured.
texts.custom_tariff_user_payment_hint: ℹ️ Next, the offer agreement will be shown, then payment details.
texts.custom_test_subscription_created: 🧪 Test subscription created Tariff: {plan_name} Devices: up to {ip_limit} Traffic: {traffic} Locations: {servers} Duration: {duration} Connection URL: {vpn_url}

texts.payment_processing_error: ❌ Payment processing error. Please try again.
texts.payment_rejected_notification: ❌ Your payment has been rejected! Please check: 1. Correct payment amount 2. Card details validity 3. Successful transfer in your banking app {trust_change_line} If you are sure everything is correct, contact support.

Wait for admin review.

texts.state_error: ❌ State error. Start the action again.
texts.subscription_active_details: ✅ Your subscription is active Tariff: {plan_text} {traffic_line}IP addresses: up to {ip_limit} Locations: {servers} Expires: {expiry_date} Trust score: {trust_score} Discount: {discount_percent}% Connection URL: {sub_url}
texts.subscription_expiring_soon: ⚠️ Your subscription expires soon Current tariff: {plan_text} Remaining: {days_left} To renew, pay for a new plan and the saved URL will be automatically extended.
texts.subscription_inactive_details: ⚠️ Subscription inactive Last tariff: {plan_text} IP addresses: up to {ip_limit} Traffic: {traffic} Locations: {servers} Trust score: {trust_score} Discount: {discount_percent}% Last URL: {sub_url}

texts.tech_work_ended: ✅ Maintenance completed! Service is operating normally. All subscriptions are being restored.
